description: Auditor binding spec for the relyable verdicts gate's audit bundle. Binds one output type: agent_test_verdict -> the test verdict re-derived by RE-PARSING the committed evidence/report.xml (the JUnit the gate itself produced) with relyable.verdicts.verdict.parse_junit_xml, compared EXACT against the claimed {tests_run, passed, failed, errored, skipped}. SCOPE: this attests the claimed verdict was correctly derived from THIS committed report, and the report is integrity-pinned -- NOT that re-running the suite reproduces it (test runs are not reproducible without sealed deps; out of scope). The parser is fixed in the verifier-side primitive named here; a producer cannot weaken it without changing a primitive_id this SHA-pinned spec would reject.
